name: Beyond a Coral Sea
short_description: Explore your way through mystical islands while learning about your characters past. In this adventure game you play as the protagonist of a memoire, telling a story from the pacific in the late 1800 century.
detailed_description:
Explore your way through mystical islands while learning about your characters past. In this short adventure game you play as the protagonist of a memoire, telling a story from the pacific in the late 1800 century.

The game requires room scale interactions and a play area of at least 2x2 m.

Finishing the game takes around 30 minutes to 2 hours depending on how you play.

We recommend taking your time, playing the game without stress in a calm environment.

We hope you like it!

Features include:

English voice acted story, Immersive environment, Beautiful soundtrack by film score composer
